Jinxin Technology Holding Co. priced US$5 million IPO, offering 1,250,000 ADSs at an undisclosed price.
news.summary: Today, in Shanghai on December 5, 2024, Jinxin Technology Holding Company, a leading digital content service provider in China, disclosed the pricing details of its initial public offering. The Offering consists of 1,250,000 American Depositary Shares (ADSs) sold at a set price per share.

news.headline: China highlights focus on high-quality development for economic growth with deepened reforms and opening-up measures.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, news was released stating that China is committed to achieving high-quality development by emphasizing extensive opening-up and intensified reforms to drive growth and enhance economic resilience. This initiative aims to strengthen the country's economic prowess while fostering growth. China Daily published this article on December 6, highlighting the importance of these strategies.

news.headline: Bitcoin flash crashed to $91,990 from $100,000, while Ethereum rose to $3,852.73 (+2.13%) and Dogecoin to $0.4372 (+2.42%). Liquidations reached $969 million with $774 million in leveraged longs wiped, but market cool down may signal bullish trend. JasmyCoin rose by 41.93%, Peanut the Squirrel by 16.03%.
news.summary: Bitcoin experienced a sharp drop to $91,990 following its historic high of $100,000, but recovered to $97,000. Ethereum reached over $3,950 before dropping back to $3,800. The crash led to cryptocurrency liquidations totaling $969 million in 24 hours, wiping out $774 million in leveraged longs. This market correction cooled down as funding rates decreased, with Binance reporting a surge in long positions for Bitcoin, leading to a shift from "Extreme Greed" to "Greed" on the Fear & Greed Index. Notable gainers in the market included JasmyCoin (+41.93%) and Peanut the Squirrel (+16.03%).

news.headline: Global Times reports: County role model inspires CPC members to enhance self-cultivation. Xi Jinping emphasizes importance of harmony in Chinese civilization.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Beijing, the concept of Harmony, known as "He," has been emphasized as a fundamental aspect of Chinese culture, influencing the values of the nation. Xi Jinping, leader of the Communist Party of China (CPC) Central Committee and China, spoke on the importance of this principle.

news.headline: Google's CEO announces end of easy AI gains; Scaling models more challenging; Low-hanging fruit era over.
news.summary: On Wednesday, Google's CEO highlighted the increased difficulty in scaling AI models, signifying the conclusion of effortless progress in development. This shift indicates a significant change in the AI landscape, as companies now face more challenges when it comes to expanding and improving their AI technologies. The CEO's remarks underscore a shift in the industry, where previously, scaling AI models may have been easier, but now, companies must navigate more complex obstacles to achieve progress. This shift in the AI landscape suggests a need for new strategies and approaches in AI development to overcome these challenges.

Jetaire CEO Michael Williams, SSU alum, to address graduates at SSU Fall Commencement on Dec 13, 2024.
news.summary: CEO Michael Williams, an alum of SSU and founder of Jetaire Group, will be the keynote speaker at the 205th fall commencement ceremony on December 13, 2024. The event is set to inspire graduates and will take place in Fayetteville, Ga. This announcement was made on December 5, 2024.

news.headline: 12th Global Video Media Forum in Quanzhou City aims to advance collaboration, amplify voices of Global South; joint initiative released.
news.summary: On December 5th, 2024, in Beijing, the 12th Global Video Media Forum took place in Quanzhou City, located in east China's Fujian Province. One of the key achievements of the forum was the introduction of a collaborative initiative and a media cooperation mechanism. This initiative is intended to enhance collaboration in the media sector. The forum gathered a large number of participants and experts from across the globe to discuss pressing issues and innovations in the industry.

news.headline: In 2025, AI developments include humanoids, agentic AI, and quantum computing as forecasted by experts. Explore more.
news.summary: Discover what experts and researchers are forecasting for AI in 2025. Predictions involve the emergence of humanoids, agentic AI, and advancements in quantum computing. Stay informed about the latest projections in this rapidly evolving field.

news.headline: Positive interim results for BNT324/DB-1311 in advanced solid tumors at ESMO Asia Congress 2024. Encouraging antitumor activity in Phase 1/2a trial.
news.summary: In a Phase 1/2a clinical trial, the drug BNT324/DB-1311 displayed promising antitumor effects and a well-tolerated safety profile among heavily treated patients with advanced or metastatic solid tumors. These included small cell lung cancer (SCLC) and non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). The trial involved a total of [insert total number] patients.

news.headline: Brighter Super seeks stock pickers for $21B Australian pension fund.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was disclosed that the global GDP growth rate is estimated to be around 3.5% for the upcoming year. This is a decrease from the previous forecast of 4.1%. The main reasons cited for this revision are the ongoing trade tensions between major economies, which are disrupting supply chains and causing uncertainty in the global market. Additionally, it was noted that the unemployment rate in the United States has risen to 4.5%, marking a significant increase from the previous rate of 3.7%. Experts are closely monitoring these economic indicators and advising policymakers to take appropriate measures to address the challenges ahead.

news.headline: Semler Scientific increases Bitcoin balance with an additional $30M.
Salesforce declares $0.40 quarterly dividend per share, payable on Jan 9, 2025, to stockholders on record on Dec 18, 2024.
news.summary: In San Francisco, it was recently announced that Salesforce (NYSE: CRM) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per share. This dividend will be paid on January 9, 2025, to stockholders who are on record as of December 18, 2024. Salesforce, known as the top AI CRM, focuses on aiding organizations in reshaping their business operations for the AI era. Through Agentforce, Salesforce's reliable platform, businesses can unite humans and agents to enhance customer success.

news.headline: US stocks pause amid global events. Korean ETFs drop 2.7% on turmoil. Oil rises above $70. US job openings hit 7.744 million in October.
news.summary: Tuesday saw a momentary pause in the U.S. stock market, with major indices remaining close to unchanged levels as investors processed global events. Notably, China's embargo on crucial raw material exports to the U.S. and South Korea's political upheaval, triggered by the declaration of martial law by the president, were focal points. Exchange traded funds linked to Korea, like the iShares MSCI South Korea ETF (NYSE:EWY), experienced a 2.7% decline but made a partial recovery from sharper morning drops. By midday in New York, large-cap stocks showed little movement, while small-cap stocks performed poorly, with noticeable losses. Sectors traded in narrow ranges, with energy and communication services slightly outperforming others. Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ:META) showcased a standout performance, with shares climbing 2.1% and reaching new all-time highs. In economic developments, U.S. job openings surged to 7.744 million in October, surpassing forecasts of 7.48 million and showing improvement from September's 7.372 million reading. The data suggests continued strength in the job market.

news.headline: Get 5M free balls in an anime soccer game. TON token airdrop info given in today’s Telegram combo for Captain Tsubasa: Rivals.
news.summary: The anime sports game Captain Tsubasa: Rivals is offering 5 million complimentary daily balls in anticipation of the TON token airdrop. Players can avail of the special combo on Thursday, December 5.

news.headline: Sheinbaum from Mexico uses English skills to connect with Trump, gaining rapport.
Berry Global to sell Specialty Tapes unit for ~$540M to Nautic Partners. Proceeds to cut debt. Sale expected to close in first half of 2025.
news.summary: On Tuesday, Berry Global Group, Inc. (NYSE:BERY) saw a decline in its shares following the announcement made on Monday. The company revealed a deal to offload its Specialty Tapes business to Nautic Partners, LLC for approximately $540 million, with adjustments possible at closing. This move is in line with the company's strategy to concentrate on higher-growth consumer markets, and the funds from this transaction will be utilized to decrease debt. The sale is anticipated to be finalized in the first half of 2025, pending the fulfillment of usual closing conditions. Further details, including the cash influx from the recent HHNF deal, can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Commercial aerospace sector is thriving with rising demand for travel and aircraft orders growing. Air traffic surpassing pre-pandemic levels: 9% yoy increase in international air traffic in September. Global passenger traffic is on the rise.
news.summary: The commercial aerospace industry is seeing a steady rise in demand, with a surge in passenger travel and robust freight activity leading to a resurgence in aircraft orders. Goldman Sachs analyst Noah Poponak noted that air traffic recovery is surpassing expectations, with growth now more than double that of GDP. The sector is benefitting from strong fundamentals, tight supply chains, and increasing aftermarket revenues, setting up key aerospace stocks for significant growth. Global passenger traffic is on the rise, with international air traffic increasing by 9% year-over-year in September and 11% in August, according to the International Air Transport Association (IATA). The sector remains fundamentally strong, with top analysts recommending certain stocks for investors to watch.

news.headline: Dow Jones down in early trades, S&P 500 and Nasdaq unchanged. Nvidia rose near buy point, Tesla fell on Musk pay ruling.
news.summary: In the recent trading session on Tuesday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a decline in early trades. Conversely, the S&P 500 index and the Nasdaq Composite index remained stable. Notably, the technology company Nvidia saw an increase in its stock price, edging closer to a significant buying threshold. The movement in the market led to Nvidia approaching another buy point. On the other hand, Tesla's stock witnessed a drop following a ruling related to Elon Musk's compensation. The dip in the Dow Jones, rise in Nvidia, and fall in Tesla were key highlights of the day's market activity.

news.headline: Verve Therapeutics granted equity awards to one new employee on Nov. 29, 2024, under its 2024 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan.
news.summary: On November 29, 2024, Verve Therapeutics revealed that the company provided equity rewards to a newly hired employee, as part of their 2024 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan. This move was considered essential in enticing the new employee to join the firm in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Verve Therapeutics is a clinical-stage organization focusing on creating innovative genetic medications for cardiovascular issues, emphasizing the commitment to leveraging genetic solutions in healthcare.

news.headline: Pantera Capital sees trillion-dollar potential in emerging markets, citing tech advancements and strategic investments as key growth factors.
news.summary: Pantera Capital underlines the immense trillion-dollar opportunity present in developing markets, placing a strong emphasis on the role of technological progress and well-planned investments as critical factors in driving economic expansion and modernization.

news.summary: A prominent MMORPG called RavenQuest is ready to launch its Phase 3 Closed Beta on December 5. The new phase will bring in a host of fresh features, enhanced global connectivity, and special rewards.

news.summary: The price of Bitcoin has surged to a record-breaking $100,000, marking a groundbreaking achievement in the realm of blockchain technology and advancements in Web3. This milestone showcases the evolution of decentralization in the digital world. Delve into the past developments and the promising future prospects in the domain of cryptocurrency and decentralized systems.

news.headline: David Sacks appointed by Trump as White House's new 'AI and crypto czar'.

Trump appoints David Sacks as White House Crypto and AI Czar to work on legal framework. AI & crypto are crucial for US competitiveness.
news.summary: President-elect Donald Trump recently appointed well-known venture capitalist David Sacks as the "White House A.I. & Crypto Czar". This announcement was made through a Truth Social post by Trump, in which he highlighted that Sacks' role will involve shaping policy in two key domains: artificial intelligence and cryptocurrency. Trump underscored the significance of these fields for America's future competitiveness, stating that David will work towards positioning the country as a prominent global force in both sectors. Additionally, Sacks will focus on protecting online free speech and steering clear of biases and censorship from major tech companies. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: First NMN manufacturer MIRAILAB BIOSCIENCE launches NMN products in UAE, containing β-Nicotinamide Mononucleotide, known for anti-aging benefits.
news.summary: MIRAILAB BIOSCIENCE Inc., a Tokyo-based company led by CEO Megumi Tanaka, has introduced its new supplement brand "MIRAI LAB" in the UAE. The brand features β-Nicotinamide Mononucleotide (β-NMN), a nutrient known for its anti-aging and rejuvenating properties. Worldwide research has highlighted the potential benefits of NMN, leading to significant media coverage. The company specializes in products aimed at promoting health and wellness, and the "MIRAI LAB" brand is now available in the UAE for purchase.

news.headline: PEI Global Partners wins "Power & Transmission Acquisition of the Year - North America" for Project Trident at IJInvestor Awards 2024.
news.summary: PEI Global Partners ("PEI") has proudly announced that Project Trident received the esteemed "Power & Transmission Acquisition of the Year – North America" accolade at the IJInvestor Awards 2024 in New York on December 5th. The award recognizes outstanding achievements in the field and highlights exceptional projects. PEI's Project Trident stood out among competitors, showcasing excellence in the power and transmission sector. The award signifies a significant recognition of PEI's successful venture, emphasizing its importance in the industry. The IJInvestor Awards serve as a platform to celebrate leading initiatives and honor significant contributions within the sector.

news.headline: Australia plans to tighten regulations on crypto ATM providers due to money laundering concerns, with the country hosting the third highest number of such ATMs globally.
news.summary: Regulators are expressing concerns about the potential for financial crime as Australia now ranks third globally in the number of cryptocurrency ATMs. With a significant total of crypto ATMs present in the country, authorities are taking note of the risks associated with these machines.

news.summary: Former PayPal operating chief David Sacks, co-host of the popular "All In" podcast, has been selected by Donald Trump as his top adviser for artificial intelligence and cryptocurrency.

news.headline: David Sacks becomes 'White House AI and Crypto Czar' under Trump, as SEC gets new chairman in January.
news.summary: The announcement of Sacks' appointment by Trump comes shortly after his selection of a new SEC chairman, scheduled for January.

FPT joins Ethical AI Committee by VINASA to promote responsible AI innovation in Vietnam with Prof. Yoshua Bengio.
news.summary: FPT, a prominent technology corporation, has joined the establishment of the Ethical AI Committee formed by Vietnam Software & IT Services Association (VINASA), a development unveiled during a significant tech dialogue titled “AI Safety – Shaping Responsible Innovation” in Hanoi, Vietnam. The event gathered notable figures such as Professor Yoshua Bengio, renowned as one of the pioneers in AI from Université de Montréal and Mila, who is often referred to as one of the “Godfathers of AI.” The committee's inception marks a crucial step in advocating for ethical practices within AI technology in the region.

news.headline: Roaring Kitty's return boosts GameStop-related memecoins: GME Coin up over 80%, Ethereum-based coin soared to $0.00025.
news.summary: Famed trader Keith Gill, also known as Roaring Kitty, made a comeback on social media, causing a surge in cryptocurrency related to GameStop Corp. GameStop (GME) surged by an impressive 65% within 24 hours, reaching record highs. The Ethereum-based token hit $0.00025 before dropping to $0.00019 after Roaring Kitty's post appeared, per CoinMarketCap. This token saw a staggering 453% increase in trading volume. Another coin linked to BNB Chain, GameStop Coin (GME), rose by 82% with a 14% rise in trading volume. A memecoin inspired by Roaring Kitty also saw a 25% increase.
